API docs by Redocly

soft-net 3rd Party API Description (1.4)

Download OpenAPI specification:Download

Document Responsible: alexander.pavlov@soft-nrg.de URL: https://www.soft-nrg.de

1 Document Overview

1.1 Version history

Version Date Author Comment
1.0 14.11.2024 Alexander Pavlov Creating initial version.
1.1 14.02.2025 Alexander Pavlov Adding 400 response code to api/planning/snaps route.
1.2 28.07.2025 Alexander Pavlov Added correct checkInDate and checkOutDate format to the snaps route
1.3 13.11.2025 Alexander Pavlov Added additional information to the "4.1 General parameters" topic
1.4 03.03.2026 Alexander Pavlov Added a new route for mobility alternatives

1.2 Scope

This document describes how a 3rd party server/service application can access the soft-nrg Planning Application resources through a REST API.

1.2 Overview

Following sections describe in detail the REST API. The documentation is structured after two main concerns:

▪ How can an application be granted access to resources?

▪ What can an application do with access once access was granted?

All routes and examples are based on the production system.

2 General API Specification

2.1 Response Type

If it applies, the used Response Tyoe is JSON.

2.2 Character Encoding

The character encoding is UTF-8.

2.3 Language codes

The user preferred language code is based on https://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47.

The code is composed of a language code (lower case) and a country code (uppercase) separated by a hyphen. Example: en-EN, de-DE, de-CH

2.4 Date/Time Format

Date/Time fields are formatted in the ISO 8601 standard.

3 Authentication/Authorisation (auth)

All queries should have a token obtained from the auth server. For details on auth, please read the documentation “3rd-party_Authentication-Authorization” in the current version.

4 API Description

4.1 General parameters

All actions using the planning system are 'sand-boxed’ in a group. As a consequence, all queries should have a header specifying the group id (the field cryptid in the group resource structure) Here is an example (the method is GET and the URL is "https://api.soft-nrg.com/resource/1")

GET /resource/1 HTTP/1.1
Host: api.soft-nrg.com
x-nrg-group:_this_is_the_group_id

Even if some resources (users, cars) are not linked to a specific group, the actions done on them are in the context of a group, so the header is needed.

The exceptions to this rule are the api.planning.groups.query and api.planning.branches.query API’s that retrieve the accessible groups and branches.

All queries should have a token obtained from the auth server. For details, please see chapter “Create and sign JWT” in the document “3rd-party_Authentication-Authorization” in the current version.

The token used, splits the APIs in 4 categories:

• If the token was obtained on behalf of the service app with scope scope.api.planning.service, it gives access to service application API’s in terms of workshop planning

• If the token was obtained on behalf of a user in the context of the service app with scope scope.api.planning.user, it gives access to user API’s in terms of workshop planning

• If the token was obtained on behalf of the service app with scope.api.planning.rent.service , it gives access to service application API’s in terms of rent appointment planning

• If the token was obtained on behalf of a user in the context of the service app with scope scope.api.planning.rent.

The resources are identified by a field called id generated by the server. When creating a new resource, the field id from the structure should not be set in the data structure sent as body to the POST request.

4.1.1 Error codes

Response code 200 Success

The body of the response contains the requested data.

Response code 404 No data found

The resource requested could not be found (e. g. nonexistent group id).

Response code 400 The input data was incorrect

The response body contains additional information about the error.

▪ For create appointment (workshop and rent):

code: '777', message: 'apptMaxCount for user exceeded' → setting from the group

code: '779', message: 'snap SB allocation already used'

▪ For cancel appointment (workshop and rent):

code: '710', message: 'Appointment not in waiting state' (Cannot be canceled!)

code: '711', message: 'Appointment past cancel interval' (Cannot be canceled!)

code: '712', message: 'Appointment was updated by branch' (Cannot be canceled currently, because it is in use! Check the status later. If the status code than is "waiting" or the category status is "upcoming" you can delete it, otherwise you cannot delete this job anymore.)

For search snaps:

code: "ValidationError" and "original.errors": ["Client is not configured for on spot appointments"] means the request contained "onSpotApp" for a client that is not configured for on spot appointments.

code: "ValidationError" and "original.errors": ["Group branches exceded onSpotApptBranchMaxCount for on spot appointments"] means the request contained "onSpotApp" and the configured number of maximum onSpot appointments per branch is exceeded for all branches/selected branch (on that day).

▪ Basically - validation errors (workshop and rent):

code: 'ValidationError', message: 'Save to database validation errors’ (a further error message regarding the error is contained in the response)

Response code 500 Internal server error

There was an error processing the request in principle.

Check the data used for technical correctness according to the specifications of the service you are using.

The response body may contain additional information about the error.

Response code 501 Error in business logic

There was an error processing the request in connection with the business logic.

Check the logic of your data used according to the requirements of the process used.

The response body may contain additional information about the error.

Response code 504 Internal error

Processing the request takes too long.

The response body may contain additional information about the error.

4.2 API Routes

4.2.1 Service Application APIs for workshop appointment planning

api.planning.groups.query

Data of the planning group.

Retrieves a list of accessible groups, possibly filtered.

This api does not need nor use the x-nrg-group header field.

Authorizations:
access_token
query Parameters
text
string

Full text search, optional

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/groups

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/groups

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "name": "string",
  • "cryptid": "string",
  • "link": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "webPage": "string",
  • "supportPhone": "string",
  • "supportEmail": "string",
  • "logo": "string",
  • "logoImage": "string",
  • "logoMobile": "string",
  • "slogan": "string",
  • "welcome": "string",
  • "usageTerms": "string",
  • "policyTerms": "string",
  • "imprint": "string",
  • "externalRefNr": "string",
  • "brand": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "allowOtherBrands": true,
  • "acceptPassingCustomer": true,
  • "allowPassingCustomer": true,
  • "apptMaxDaysInFuture": 0,
  • "apptMaxCount": 0,
  • "acceptWaitingCustomer": true,
  • "CustomerNotifications": {
    • "Passing": {
      • "SMS": true,
      • "SMTP": true
      },
    • "Normal": {
      • "SMS": true,
      • "SMTP": true
      }
    },
  • "hideSBName": true,
  • "wishlistOptions": {
    • "disablePictures": true,
    • "disableNote": true,
    • "disableCallback": true
    },
  • "acceptExtClients": true,
  • "state": "active",
  • "databases": [
    • {
      • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
      • "name": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "branches": [
    • {
      • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
      • "name": "string",
      • "branchLabel": "string"
      }
    ]
}

access_token
path Parameters

required

api.planning.branches.query

Retrieves a list of branches, possibly filtered.

If the header x-nrg-group is set then the branches will be filtered by the specified group.

If the header is missing, all accessible branches that match the other query fields are retrieved, regardless of the group.

Authorizations:
access_token
query Parameters
databaseid
string = 24 characters

id of the database containing the branches

text
string

full text search

connectionState
string
Enum: "ofb" "online" "offline"

one of "ofb","online","offline",

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/branches

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/branches

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "databaseid": {
    • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
    • "name": "string",
    • "firma": "string"
    },
  • "groups": {
    • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
    • "groupid": {
      • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
      • "name": "string"
      },
    • "state": "active"
    },
  • "dbState": "active",
  • "dbRegState": "registered",
  • "dbConnectionState": "ofb",
  • "licenseState": "licensed",
  • "branchKey": "string",
  • "branchLabel": "string",
  • "branchID": "string",
  • "firma": "string",
  • "displayName": "string",
  • "name": "string",
  • "firstName": "string",
  • "street": "string",
  • "PLZ": "string",
  • "city": "string",
  • "country": "string",
  • "email": "string",
  • "externalID": "string",
  • "webAddress": "string",
  • "tel": "string",
  • "fax": "string",
  • "financeID1": "string",
  • "financeID2": "string",
  • "additionalInformation": "string",
  • "preferredLangID": "string",
  • "TZDescription": "string",
  • "openingHours": "string",
  • "lastModifiedUser": "string",
  • "lastModified": "2019-08-24"
}

api.planning.branches.findBranchProperties

Get the extended branch properties (for a group).

Authorizations:
access_token
path Parameters
branchid
required
string = 24 characters

id of the requested branch

groupid
required
string = 24 characters

id of the requested branch

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/branches/{branchid}/group/{groupid}

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/branches/{branchid}/group/{groupid}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "branchid": {
    • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
    • "branchLabel": "string"
    },
  • "databaseid": {
    • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
    • "name": "string"
    },
  • "groupid": {
    • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
    • "name": "string"
    },
  • "Config": {
    • "General": {
      • "Terms": "string",
      • "Brands": [
        • {
          • "Brand": "string",
          • "isEnabled": "string"
          }
        ],
      • "AllowOtherBrands": true
      },
    • "TimeFrame": {
      • "Morning": {
        • "From": "string",
        • "To": "string"
        },
      • "Afternoon": {
        • "From": "string",
        • "To": "string"
        }
      },
    • "Rent": {
      • "RentMobility": {
        • "Resources": true,
        • "Alternatives": true,
        • "None": true
        },
      • "RentCategoriesMap": [
        • {
          • "RentCatID": "stringstringstringstring",
          • "RentCatName": "string",
          • "RentItems": [
            • {
              • "RentGroupKey": 0,
              • "RentGroupName": "string",
              • "IsRentItemGroup": true
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      },
    • "Operations": {
      • "OperationMap": [
        • {
          • "OperationID": "string",
          • "OperationName": "string",
          • "OperationDescription": "string",
          • "MaxPerDay": 0,
          • "MaxPerWeek": 0,
          • "OnlyOnWeekdays": "string",
          • "BrandMap": [
            • {
              • "Brands": [
                • "string"
                ],
              • "OperationKey": 0,
              • "OperationName": "string"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      },
    • "AppBehaviour": {
      • "OnlyOnWeekdays": "string",
      • "StartEarliestTime": "string",
      • "StartLatestTime": "string",
      • "EndEarliestTime": "string",
      • "EndLatestTime": "string",
      • "FirstAppDays": "string",
      • "FavorTheLastSA": true,
      • "CustomerPassingAllowed": true,
      • "CustomerWaiting": {
        • "Allowed": true,
        • "Enabled": true,
        • "MaxNrPerDay": 0,
        • "MaxAWPerDay": 0
        },
      • "SA": [
        • {
          • "SAKey": "string",
          • "SAName": "string",
          • "Brands": [
            • "string"
            ],
          • "Other": true,
          • "Any": true
          }
        ],
      • "CustomerNotifications": {
        • "AvailableChannels": {
          • "SMS": true,
          • "SMTP": true
          },
        • "Passing": {
          • "SMS": true,
          • "SMTP": true
          },
        • "Normal": {
          • "SMS": true,
          • "SMTP": true
          }
        },
      • "StatusMap": [
        • {
          • "ID": "stringstringstringstring",
          • "OpStatusKey": 0
          }
        ],
      • "MaxCancelInterval": 0
      }
    },
  • "lastModifiedUser": "string",
  • "lastModified": "2019-08-24"
}

Car brands that the group can process.

Authorizations:
access_token
query Parameters
groupid
string = 24 characters

return only brands enabled in the specified group

text
string

full text search

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/brands

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/brands

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "name": "string"
}

api.planning.jobtypes.query

Available job types for the current group.

Currently can be of type normal or customer waiting.

Authorizations:
access_token
query Parameters
text
string

Full text search

brand
string

Brand of the car.

If present, the Response: will contain the field branches that contains the branches where the job type is valid

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/jobtypes

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/jobtypes

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "code": "normal",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "branches": [
    • "stringstringstringstring"
    ]
}

Available operations types for the current group.

Authorizations:
access_token
query Parameters

If present, the Response: will contain the field branches that contains the branches where the job type is valid

api.planning.tags.query

Available operation tags for the current group.

Default sorted by sequence value

Authorizations:
access_token
query Parameters
text
string

Full text search for the scope.api.planning.service

resourceType
string
Enum: "rentInternalCar" "rentObject" "operation"

For scope.api.planning.rent.service

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/tags

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/tags

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "groupid": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "name": "string",
  • "rank": 0
}

api.planning.fields.query

Fields for user or car that are needed for successful registration.

Authorizations:
access_token
query Parameters
scope
string
Enum: "user" "car"
text
string

Full text search

fixed
boolean
mandatory
boolean
app
string

Should be specified for rent mandatory fields value: 'rent’ (default 'plan’ in desktop/mobile context)

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/fields

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/fields

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "groupid": {
    • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
    • "name": "string"
    },
  • "scope": "user",
  • "field": "string",
  • "fixed": true,
  • "mandatory": true
}

api.planning.users.add

Create a user account.

The user account is created with a password.

Authorizations:
access_token
Request Body schema: application/json
id
required
string = 24 characters

24 char

email
required
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char

lastName
required
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char

firstName
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char

phone
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char

mobile
required
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char

address
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char

zipCode
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char

city
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char

country
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char

language
string <= 20 characters

max 20 char

object

the structure is optional

globalID
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/users

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/users

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "email": "string",
  • "lastName": "string",
  • "firstName": "string",
  • "phone": "string",
  • "mobile": "string",
  • "address": "string",
  • "zipCode": "string",
  • "city": "string",
  • "country": "string",
  • "language": "string",
  • "dataProtection": {
    • "contacted": true,
    • "customerAcceptanceDate": "2019-08-24",
    • "dateOfExpiry": "2019-08-24",
    • "dealerLetter": true,
    • "dealerTelephone": true,
    • "dealerSMS": true,
    • "dealerFax": true,
    • "dealerEMail": true,
    • "manufacturerLetter": true,
    • "manufacturerTelephone": true,
    • "manufacturerSMS": true,
    • "manufacturerFax": true,
    • "manufacturerEMail": true,
    • "blocked": true,
    • "revocation": true,
    • "dataPrivacyComment": "string"
    },
  • "globalID": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "email": "string",
  • "lastName": "string",
  • "firstName": "string",
  • "phone": "string",
  • "mobile": "string",
  • "address": "string",
  • "zipCode": "string",
  • "city": "string",
  • "country": "string",
  • "language": "string",
  • "dataProtection": {
    • "contacted": true,
    • "customerAcceptanceDate": "2019-08-24",
    • "dateOfExpiry": "2019-08-24",
    • "dealerLetter": true,
    • "dealerTelephone": true,
    • "dealerSMS": true,
    • "dealerFax": true,
    • "dealerEMail": true,
    • "manufacturerLetter": true,
    • "manufacturerTelephone": true,
    • "manufacturerSMS": true,
    • "manufacturerFax": true,
    • "manufacturerEMail": true,
    • "blocked": true,
    • "revocation": true,
    • "dataPrivacyComment": "string"
    },
  • "globalID": "string"
}

api.planning.snaps.query

A snap is a possible appointment obtained based on a Wishlist.

To create an appointment from a snap, use the api.planning.appointments.add api.

Following information is for scope.api.planning.rent.service and scope.api.planning.rent.user

• No car data is required (if set will be ignored)

• Fleet relevant fields should be set in Wishlist resource:

o isFleet: Boolean, // mandatory set on true

o fleetType: String, // mandatory rentObject or rentInternalCar

o fleetCategoryid: String, // mandatory id of the fleetcategory resource

o checkInDatePreference: String, // 'asSoonAsPossible', 'date'

o checkInDate: Date, // required if checkInDatePreference is 'date'

o checkOutDate: Date, // optional check out date

o spendTime: String" // optional, format: NumberTimeUnit (5d, 12h) where TimeUnit = [h, d] (h=hours, d=days)
Authorizations:
access_token
Request Body schema: application/json
groupid
required
string = 24 characters

24 char

preferredBranch
string = 24 characters

24 char, preferred branch id

brand
required
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char, brand of the car, for use in operation and rent categories mappings. Should match the value in the saved car.

checkInDatePreference
string
Enum: "asSoonAsPossible" "date"

If the selected value is 'date' then the checkInDate must be set to the desired date

checkInDate
string <date-time>

used only if checkInDatePreference = "date"

checkOutDate
string <date-time>

check out date for rent appointment

checkInTimePreference
string
Enum: "any" "AM" "PM"

Don't care, before noon after noon as defined in the branch settings

waitPreference
boolean

if true, taken into account if the 'waiting' job type is supported by the group and branch

callbackPreference
boolean
directAcceptance
boolean
object

Express appointment option - Used by 3rd party clients to create on spot appointments (The API user must be authorized for the "Express appointment" option.)

operations
Array of strings[ items = 24 characters ]

array of strings, at least one operation, vault item or external operation should be present

vaultItems
Array of strings[ items = 24 characters ]

array of strings, at least one operation, vault item or external operation should be present

Array of objects

array of structures similar to vaultItems

replacementPreference
boolean
rentCategoryid
string = 24 characters

24 char, id in rentCategory resource. If empty or missing, means any rent category

object
object
object
note
string <= 2000 characters

max 2000 char

noteStockItems
string <= 2000 characters

max 2000 char

isFleet
boolean

mandatory for rent appointments

fleetType
string
Enum: "char" "rentObject" "rentInternalCar"

mandatory for rent appointments

fleetCategoryid
string

mandatory for rent appointments, id in fleetcategory collection

spendTime
string

mandatory for fleet appointment if "checkInDate" is set (ex. 3h, 4d)

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/snaps

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/snaps

  • Payload
Content type
application/json

api.planning.appointments.add

Following information is for scope.api.planning.service

Quick appointment feature: API is available with service token. Create an appointment based on a snap without the need to log on a user.

A snap is a possible appointment obtained based on a Wishlist without the user data.

The Wishlist should contain the car data.

One of the snaps obtained using the api.planning.snaps.query should be sent back to create an appointment.

If the snap contains external operations these can be modified:

• the name and description for the external operation

• the name and description for the embedded operation

• the name and description for the embedded parts

If not already present in the snap, the snap should be patched with the client data. e. g.:

snap.wishlist.client: // User structure

{

email: newUser_email,

lastName: newUser_lastName,

firstName: newUser_firstName,

mobile: newUser_mobile

}

• If a client with the same email exists, the existing user profile will be used.

• If a client with the same email does not exist, a new user profile will be created.

• If a car with the same VIN and license number exists for the user, the existing car will be used.

• If a car with the same VIN and license number does not exist for the user, the new car will be created.

Following information is for scope.api.planning.rent.service

• No car data is required, if set will be ignored.

Following information is for scope.api.planning.user

Create an appointment based on a snap. A snap is a possible appointment obtained based on a Wishlist.

One of the snaps obtained using the api.planning.snaps.query should be sent back to create an appointment.

If the snap contains external operations these can be modified:

• the name and description for the external operation

• the name and description for the embedded operation

• the name and description for the embedded parts

Following information is for scope.api.planning.rent.user

• An appointment can be saved only with a fleet category resource (other combinations are not allowed ex: operations-fleetCategory or externalOperations-fleetCategory)

• No car data is required, if set will be ignored.

Authorizations:
access_token
Request Body schema: application/json
ranking
number

ranking, 3 = best, 2 = medium, 1 = worst, based on score/ranking.

score
number

score

groupid
string

24 char group id

branch
object

24 char branch id

jobTypeCode
string
Enum: "normal" "waiting"
checkInTime
string <date-time>
checkOutTime
string <date-time>
daySpan
number

number of days elapsed between checkInTime and the end of the appointment

totalDurationTime
number

length of the appointment in seconds between the checkIntime and the end of the last operation. The value is computed if the job type is "waiting"

checkInResource
string <= 100 characters

name of ServiceAdvisor

checkInResourceInternalNumber
string <= 100 characters

based on ServiceAdvisor - Internal System Number

checkInResourceEmployeNumber
string <= 100 characters

based on ServiceAdvisor - Employe Number

checkInResourceDMSNumber
string <= 100 characters

based on ServiceAdvisor - number from DMS

replacementStart
string <date-time>

UTC ISO 8601

replacementEnd
string <date-time>

UTC ISO 8601

replacementResource
string <= 100 characters
object (WishlistResource)

All property values are used in the allocation engine to find a possible appointment (snap).

Except for the operations, the properties are treated as "should be". If they cannot be met, a snap may be returned to the user with a decreased score/ranking.

internal
string <= 10000 characters

encoded internal structure, pass it back as is at new appointment

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/appointments

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/appointments

        • "dateOfExpiry": "2019-08-24",
        • "dealerLetter": true,
        • "dealerTelephone": true,
        • "dealerSMS": true,
        • "dealerFax": true,
        • "dealerEMail": true,
        • "manufacturerLetter": true,
        • "manufacturerTelephone": true,
        • "manufacturerSMS": true,
        • "manufacturerFax": true,
        • "manufacturerEMail": true,
        • "blocked": true,
        • "revocation": true,
        • "dataPrivacyComment": "string"
        },
      • "globalID": "string"
      },
    • "car": {
      • "id": "string",
      • "brand": "string",
      • "model": "string",
      • "license": "string",
      • "VIN": "string",
      • "firstRegYear": 0,
      • "firstRegMonth": 0,
      • "currentMileage": 0
      },
    • "notifications": {
      • "SMS": true,
      • "SMTP": true
      },
    • "note": "string",
    • "noteStockItems": "string",
    • "isFleet": true,
    • "fleetType": "char",
    • "fleetCategoryid": "string",
    • "spendTime": "string"
    }
}

scope
string

fixed
boolean
mandatory
boolean
app
string

api.planning.snaps.query

A snap is a possible appointment obtained based on a Wishlist.

To create an appointment from a snap, use the api.planning.appointments.add api.

Following information is for scope.api.planning.rent.service and scope.api.planning.rent.user

• No car data is required (if set will be ignored)

• Fleet relevant fields should be set in Wishlist resource:

o isFleet: Boolean, // mandatory set on true

o fleetType: String, // mandatory rentObject or rentInternalCar

o fleetCategoryid: String, // mandatory id of the fleetcategory resource

o checkInDatePreference: String, // 'asSoonAsPossible', 'date'

o checkInDate: Date, // required if checkInDatePreference is 'date'

o checkOutDate: Date, // optional check out date

o spendTime: String" // optional, format: NumberTimeUnit (5d, 12h) where TimeUnit = [h, d] (h=hours, d=days)
Authorizations:
access_token
Request Body schema: application/json
groupid
required
string = 24 characters

24 char

preferredBranch
string = 24 characters

24 char, preferred branch id

brand
required
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char, brand of the car, for use in operation and rent categories mappings. Should match the value in the saved car.

checkInDatePreference
string
Enum: "asSoonAsPossible" "date"

If the selected value is 'date' then the checkInDate must be set to the desired date

checkInDate
string <date-time>

used only if checkInDatePreference = "date"

checkOutDate
string <date-time>

check out date for rent appointment

checkInTimePreference
string
Enum: "any" "AM" "PM"

Don't care, before noon after noon as defined in the branch settings

waitPreference
boolean

if true, taken into account if the 'waiting' job type is supported by the group and branch

callbackPreference
boolean
directAcceptance
boolean
object

Express appointment option - Used by 3rd party clients to create on spot appointments (The API user must be authorized for the "Express appointment" option.)

operations
Array of strings[ items = 24 characters ]

array of strings, at least one operation, vault item or external operation should be present

vaultItems
Array of strings[ items = 24 characters ]

array of strings, at least one operation, vault item or external operation should be present

Array of objects

array of structures similar to vaultItems

replacementPreference
boolean
rentCategoryid
string = 24 characters

24 char, id in rentCategory resource. If empty or missing, means any rent category

object
object
object
note
string <= 2000 characters

max 2000 char

noteStockItems
string <= 2000 characters

max 2000 char

isFleet
boolean

mandatory for rent appointments

fleetType
string
Enum: "char" "rentObject" "rentInternalCar"

mandatory for rent appointments

fleetCategoryid
string

mandatory for rent appointments, id in fleetcategory collection

spendTime
string

mandatory for fleet appointment if "checkInDate" is set (ex. 3h, 4d)

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/snaps

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/snaps

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "groupid": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "preferredBranch": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "brand": "string",
  • "checkInDatePreference": "asSoonAsPossible",

  • "checkOutDate": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",

  • "callbackPreference": true,
  • "directAcceptance": true,

    • "repair": true
    },

  • "noteStockItems": "string",

api.planning.appointments.add

Following information is for scope.api.planning.service

Quick appointment feature: API is available with service token. Create an appointment based on a snap without the need to log on a user.

A snap is a possible appointment obtained based on a Wishlist without the user data.

The Wishlist should contain the car data.

One of the snaps obtained using the api.planning.snaps.query should be sent back to create an appointment.

If the snap contains external operations these can be modified:

• the name and description for the external operation

• the name and description for the embedded operation

• the name and description for the embedded parts

If not already present in the snap, the snap should be patched with the client data. e. g.:

snap.wishlist.client: // User structure

{

email: newUser_email,

lastName: newUser_lastName,

firstName: newUser_firstName,

mobile: newUser_mobile

}

• If a client with the same email exists, the existing user profile will be used.

• If a client with the same email does not exist, a new user profile will be created.

• If a car with the same VIN and license number exists for the user, the existing car will be used.

• If a car with the same VIN and license number does not exist for the user, the new car will be created.

Following information is for scope.api.planning.rent.service

• No car data is required, if set will be ignored.

Following information is for scope.api.planning.user

Create an appointment based on a snap. A snap is a possible appointment obtained based on a Wishlist.

One of the snaps obtained using the api.planning.snaps.query should be sent back to create an appointment.

If the snap contains external operations these can be modified:

• the name and description for the external operation

• the name and description for the embedded operation

• the name and description for the embedded parts

Following information is for scope.api.planning.rent.user

• An appointment can be saved only with a fleet category resource (other combinations are not allowed ex: operations-fleetCategory or externalOperations-fleetCategory)

• No car data is required, if set will be ignored.

Authorizations:
access_token
Request Body schema: application/json
ranking
number

ranking, 3 = best, 2 = medium, 1 = worst, based on score/ranking.

score
number

score

groupid
string

24 char group id

branch
object

24 char branch id

jobTypeCode
string
Enum: "normal" "waiting"
checkInTime
string <date-time>
checkOutTime
string <date-time>
daySpan
number

number of days elapsed between checkInTime and the end of the appointment

totalDurationTime
number

length of the appointment in seconds between the checkIntime and the end of the last operation. The value is computed if the job type is "waiting"

checkInResource
string <= 100 characters

name of ServiceAdvisor

checkInResourceInternalNumber
string <= 100 characters

based on ServiceAdvisor - Internal System Number

checkInResourceEmployeNumber
string <= 100 characters

based on ServiceAdvisor - Employe Number

checkInResourceDMSNumber
string <= 100 characters

based on ServiceAdvisor - number from DMS

replacementStart
string <date-time>

UTC ISO 8601

replacementEnd
string <date-time>

UTC ISO 8601

replacementResource
string <= 100 characters
object (WishlistResource)

All property values are used in the allocation engine to find a possible appointment (snap).

Except for the operations, the properties are treated as "should be". If they cannot be met, a snap may be returned to the user with a decreased score/ranking.

internal
string <= 10000 characters

encoded internal structure, pass it back as is at new appointment

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/appointments

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/appointments

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "ranking": 0,
  • "score": 0,
  • "groupid": "string",
  • "branch": { },
  • "jobTypeCode": "normal",
  • "checkInTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "checkOutTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",

  • "totalDurationTime": 0,

  • "replacementStart": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "replacementEnd": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",

      • "repair": true
      },
    • "operations": [
      • "stringstringstringstring"
      ],
    • "vaultItems": [

      ],

        • "packageType": "string",
        • "campaignNumber": "string",

        • "price": {
          • "brutto": 0,
          • "netto": 0,
          • "currency": "string"
          },

    • "client": {
      • "email": "string",
      • "lastName": "string",
      • "firstName": "string",
      • "phone": "string",
      • "mobile": "string",

    },

}

api.planning.fleetcategory.query

Available fleet categories for the current group and their conditions for reservation of appointments.

Authorizations:
access_token
query Parameters
text
string

Full text search

startDate
string <date-time>

ISODate 8601 and if used, one of endDate or spendTime should be specified

endDate
string <date-time>

ISO 8601

spendTime
string

format: NumberTimeUnit (5d, 12h) where TimeUnit = [h, d]

isFixed
boolean

If set on true will return only fleet categories with a fix spend time

type
string
Enum: "rentObject" "rentInternalCar"

filter fleet categories based on type

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/fleetcategory

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/fleetcategory

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "groupid": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "image": "string",
  • "tags": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "order": 0,
  • "type": "rentObject",
  • "fixSpendTime": "string",
  • "minSpendTime": "string",
  • "maxSpendTime": "string"
}

api.planning.fleetcategory.findOne

Available fleet categories for the current group and their conditions for reservation of appointments.

Authorizations:
access_token
path Parameters
id
required
string = 24 characters

id of the fleet category

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/fleetcategory/{id}

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/fleetcategory/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "groupid": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "image": "string",
  • "tags": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "order": 0,
  • "type": "rentObject",
  • "fixSpendTime": "string",
  • "minSpendTime": "string",
  • "maxSpendTime": "string"
}

4.2.3 User APIs for workshop appointment planning

api.planning.snaps.query

A snap is a possible appointment obtained based on a Wishlist.

To create an appointment from a snap, use the api.planning.appointments.add api.

Following information is for scope.api.planning.rent.service and scope.api.planning.rent.user

• No car data is required (if set will be ignored)

• Fleet relevant fields should be set in Wishlist resource:

o isFleet: Boolean, // mandatory set on true

o fleetType: String, // mandatory rentObject or rentInternalCar

o fleetCategoryid: String, // mandatory id of the fleetcategory resource

o checkInDatePreference: String, // 'asSoonAsPossible', 'date'

o checkInDate: Date, // required if checkInDatePreference is 'date'

o checkOutDate: Date, // optional check out date

o spendTime: String" // optional, format: NumberTimeUnit (5d, 12h) where TimeUnit = [h, d] (h=hours, d=days)
Authorizations:
access_token
Request Body schema: application/json
groupid
required
string = 24 characters

24 char

preferredBranch
string = 24 characters

24 char, preferred branch id

brand
required
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char, brand of the car, for use in operation and rent categories mappings. Should match the value in the saved car.

checkInDatePreference
string
Enum: "asSoonAsPossible" "date"

If the selected value is 'date' then the checkInDate must be set to the desired date

checkInDate
string <date-time>

used only if checkInDatePreference = "date"

checkOutDate
string <date-time>

check out date for rent appointment

checkInTimePreference
string
Enum: "any" "AM" "PM"

Don't care, before noon after noon as defined in the branch settings

waitPreference
boolean

if true, taken into account if the 'waiting' job type is supported by the group and branch

callbackPreference
boolean
directAcceptance
boolean
object

Express appointment option - Used by 3rd party clients to create on spot appointments (The API user must be authorized for the "Express appointment" option.)

operations
Array of strings[ items = 24 characters ]

array of strings, at least one operation, vault item or external operation should be present

vaultItems
Array of strings[ items = 24 characters ]

array of strings, at least one operation, vault item or external operation should be present

Array of objects

array of structures similar to vaultItems

replacementPreference
boolean
rentCategoryid
string = 24 characters

24 char, id in rentCategory resource. If empty or missing, means any rent category

object
object
object
note
string <= 2000 characters

max 2000 char

noteStockItems
string <= 2000 characters

max 2000 char

isFleet
boolean

mandatory for rent appointments

fleetType
string
Enum: "char" "rentObject" "rentInternalCar"

mandatory for rent appointments

fleetCategoryid
string

mandatory for rent appointments, id in fleetcategory collection

spendTime
string

mandatory for fleet appointment if "checkInDate" is set (ex. 3h, 4d)

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/snaps

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/snaps

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json

  • "groupid": "stringstringstringstring",

api.planning.appointments.query

Get a list of appointments.

Authorizations:
access_token
query Parameters
carid
string = 24 characters

Appointments car id

text
string

Full text search

state
string
Enum: "waiting" "contact" "finished" "cancelled" "deleted"
current
boolean
Value: true

if present it should be 'true’

upcoming
boolean
Value: true

if present it should be 'true’

past
boolean
Value: true

if present it should be 'true’

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/appointments

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/appointments

    • "replacementPreference": true,
    • "rentCategoryid": "stringstringstringstring",
    • "client": {
      • "email": "string",
      • "lastName": "string",
      • "firstName": "string",
      • "phone": "string",
      • "mobile": "string",
      • "address": "string",
      • "zipCode": "string",
      • "city": "string",
      • "country": "string",
      • "language": "string",
      • "dataProtection": {
        • "contacted": true,
        • "customerAcceptanceDate": "2019-08-24",
        • "dateOfExpiry": "2019-08-24",
        • "dealerLetter": true,
        • "dealerTelephone": true,
        • "dealerSMS": true,
        • "dealerFax": true,
        • "dealerEMail": true,
        • "manufacturerLetter": true,
        • "manufacturerTelephone": true,
        • "manufacturerSMS": true,
        • "manufacturerFax": true,
        • "manufacturerEMail": true,
        • "blocked": true,
        • "revocation": true,
        • "dataPrivacyComment": "string"
        },
      • "globalID": "string"
      },
    • "car": {
      • "id": "string",
      • "brand": "string",
      • "model": "string",
      • "license": "string",
      • "VIN": "string",
      • "firstRegYear": 0,
      • "firstRegMonth": 0,
      • "currentMileage": 0
      },
    • "notifications": {
      • "SMS": true,
      • "SMTP": true
      },
    • "note": "string",
    • "noteStockItems": "string",
    • "isFleet": true,
    • "fleetType": "char",
    • "fleetCategoryid": "string",
    • "spendTime": "string"
    }
}

api.planning.appointments.add

Following information is for scope.api.planning.service

Quick appointment feature: API is available with service token. Create an appointment based on a snap without the need to log on a user.

A snap is a possible appointment obtained based on a Wishlist without the user data.

The Wishlist should contain the car data.

One of the snaps obtained using the api.planning.snaps.query should be sent back to create an appointment.

If the snap contains external operations these can be modified:

• the name and description for the external operation

• the name and description for the embedded operation

• the name and description for the embedded parts

If not already present in the snap, the snap should be patched with the client data. e. g.:

snap.wishlist.client: // User structure

{

email: newUser_email,

lastName: newUser_lastName,

firstName: newUser_firstName,

mobile: newUser_mobile

}

• If a client with the same email exists, the existing user profile will be used.

• If a client with the same email does not exist, a new user profile will be created.

• If a car with the same VIN and license number exists for the user, the existing car will be used.

• If a car with the same VIN and license number does not exist for the user, the new car will be created.

Following information is for scope.api.planning.rent.service

• No car data is required, if set will be ignored.

Following information is for scope.api.planning.user

Create an appointment based on a snap. A snap is a possible appointment obtained based on a Wishlist.

One of the snaps obtained using the api.planning.snaps.query should be sent back to create an appointment.

If the snap contains external operations these can be modified:

• the name and description for the external operation

• the name and description for the embedded operation

• the name and description for the embedded parts

Following information is for scope.api.planning.rent.user

• An appointment can be saved only with a fleet category resource (other combinations are not allowed ex: operations-fleetCategory or externalOperations-fleetCategory)

• No car data is required, if set will be ignored.

Authorizations:
access_token
Request Body schema: application/json
ranking
number

ranking, 3 = best, 2 = medium, 1 = worst, based on score/ranking.

score
number

score

groupid
string

24 char group id

branch
object

24 char branch id

jobTypeCode
string
Enum: "normal" "waiting"
checkInTime
string <date-time>
checkOutTime
string <date-time>
daySpan
number

number of days elapsed between checkInTime and the end of the appointment

totalDurationTime
number

length of the appointment in seconds between the checkIntime and the end of the last operation. The value is computed if the job type is "waiting"

checkInResource
string <= 100 characters

name of ServiceAdvisor

checkInResourceInternalNumber
string <= 100 characters

based on ServiceAdvisor - Internal System Number

checkInResourceEmployeNumber
string <= 100 characters

based on ServiceAdvisor - Employe Number

checkInResourceDMSNumber
string <= 100 characters

based on ServiceAdvisor - number from DMS

replacementStart
string <date-time>

UTC ISO 8601

replacementEnd
string <date-time>

UTC ISO 8601

replacementResource
string <= 100 characters
object (WishlistResource)

All property values are used in the allocation engine to find a possible appointment (snap).

Except for the operations, the properties are treated as "should be". If they cannot be met, a snap may be returned to the user with a decreased score/ranking.

internal
string <= 10000 characters

encoded internal structure, pass it back as is at new appointment

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/appointments

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/appointments

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "ranking": 0,
  • "score": 0,
  • "groupid": "string",
  • "branch": { },
  • "jobTypeCode": "normal",
  • "checkInTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "checkOutTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "daySpan": 0,
  • "totalDurationTime": 0,
  • "checkInResource": "string",
  • "checkInResourceInternalNumber": "string",
  • "checkInResourceEmployeNumber": "string",
  • "checkInResourceDMSNumber": "string",
  • "replacementStart": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "replacementEnd": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "replacementResource": "string",
  • "wishlist": {
    • "groupid": "stringstringstringstring",
    • "preferredBranch": "stringstringstringstring",
    • "brand": "string",
    • "checkInDatePreference": "asSoonAsPossible",
    • "checkInDate": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "checkOutDate": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",

      },

      ],

api.planning.appointments.findOne

Get an appointment by ID. The value is the same as the currency field in the appointment structure.

Authorizations:
access_token
path Parameters
id
required
string = 24 characters

id of the appointment

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/appointments/{id}

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/appointments/{id}

api.planning.appointments.cancel

Cancel an appointment identified by ID.

An appointment can only be canceled if the appointment status is "waiting".

That means, the value of the key "statusCode" of the appointment resource is "waiting

Alternatively, the appointment category status can be queried using the API route "api.planning.appointments.findCategory".

An appointment can only be canceled if the response from this route shows the category status as "upcoming"

Authorizations:
access_token
path Parameters
id
required
string = 24 characters

id of the appointment

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/appointments/{id}/cancel

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/appointments/{id}/cancel

              },
            • "quantity": {
              • "value": 0,
              • "unitsPerHour": 0,
              • "unit": "string"
              }
            }
          ],
        • "parts": [
          • {
            • "name": "string",
            • "description": "string",
            • "extRefNr": "string",
            • "price": {
              • "brutto": 0,
              • "netto": 0,
              • "currency": "string"
              },
            • "quantity": {
              • "value": 0,
              • "unit": "string"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      ],
    • "replacementPreference": true,
    • "rentCategoryid": "stringstringstringstring",
    • "client": {
      • "email": "string",
      • "lastName": "string",
      • "firstName": "string",
      • "phone": "string",
      • "mobile": "string",
      • "address": "string",
      • "zipCode": "string",
      • "city": "string",
      • "country": "string",
      • "language": "string",
      • "dataProtection": {
        • "contacted": true,
        • "customerAcceptanceDate": "2019-08-24",
        • "dateOfExpiry": "2019-08-24",
        • "dealerLetter": true,
        • "dealerTelephone": true,
        • "dealerSMS": true,
        • "dealerFax": true,
        • "dealerEMail": true,
        • "manufacturerLetter": true,
        • "manufacturerTelephone": true,
        • "manufacturerSMS": true,
        • "manufacturerFax": true,
        • "manufacturerEMail": true,
        • "blocked": true,
        • "revocation": true,
        • "dataPrivacyComment": "string"
        },
      • "globalID": "string"
      },
    • "car": {
      • "id": "string",
      • "brand": "string",
      • "model": "string",
      • "license": "string",
      • "VIN": "string",
      • "firstRegYear": 0,
      • "firstRegMonth": 0,
      • "currentMileage": 0
      },
    • "notifications": {
      • "SMS": true,
      • "SMTP": true
      },
    • "note": "string",
    • "noteStockItems": "string",
    • "isFleet": true,
    • "fleetType": "char",
    • "fleetCategoryid": "string",
    • "spendTime": "string"
    }
}

api.planning.appointments.findCategory

Get the appointment status categorie by ID.

The appointment status category is based on the date and status of the appointment:

• past: appointments are finished state, the date is in the past

• current: appointment status is 'inprogress’ or 'contact’ regardless of the date or status is in waiting and the date is less than the current time plus two days

• upcoming: appointment status is 'waiting’ and the appointment date is further than the current time plus two days

Authorizations:
access_token
path Parameters
id
required
string = 24 characters

id of the appointment

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/appointments/{id}/category

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/appointments/{id}/category

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
"current"

api.planning.images.uploadFormData

The images are uploaded using form data to allow for JSON properties and a file containing the actual image.

"multipart/form-data" contains a series of parts. Each part is to contain a content-disposition header where the type is "form-data", and where the disposition contains (additional) parameter of "name".

The first part of the multipart data should have the name "model" and contain the JSON with the image metadata,

referenceScope = "appointment"

referenceID = appointment id

Content-Disposition: form-data; name="model"

The second part of the multipart data should have the name "file_pool" and contain the actual image file.

Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file_pool"

The parts are separated by a boundary selected that does not occur in any of the data.

The boundary should start with two dashes '–' and the last boundary should be suffixes with two dashes (MIME multipart).

Parameters:

• referenceId : String // id of the appointment, mandatory, 24 char … as part of the Request payload → see also below

Headers:

...
Content-Type:multipart/form-data; boundary=randomboundarycharacters
...

Request payload:

--randomboundarycharacters
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="model"

{"referenceScope":"appointment","referenceId":"_this_is_the_appointment_id_"}
--randomboundarycharacters
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file_pool"

data:image/png;base64, ........
--randomboundarycharacters--
Authorizations:
access_token

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/images

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/images

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "name": "string",
  • "base64prefix": "string",
  • "imageExtension": "string",
  • "referenceScope": "group",
  • "referenceId": "stringstringstringstring"
}

api.planning.users.canMakeAppointment

Based on the group settings, a user is limited to the number of appointments created in a day.

Use this service to query the possibility to create a new appointment currently.

Authorizations:
access_token

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/users/canmakeappointment

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/users/canmakeappointment

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
true

api.planning.cars.add

The cars are filtered to the user profile of the user associated with the token.

Create a new car for a user.

To specify the owner of the car, the field userid should be set to the value of the current user id (as returned from api.planning.users.findOne API).

Example for a car resource to add

{
"userid": "123456781234567812345678",
"brand": "...",
...
"currentMileage": "15000"
}
Authorizations:
access_token
Request Body schema: application/json
id
required
string = 24 characters

24 char

object
brand
required
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char

model
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char

license
required
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char

VIN
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char

firstRegYear
number

if present, min value is 1901

firstRegMonth
number

Valid values are 0 = January to 11 = December

currentMileage
number

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/cars

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/cars

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "userid": {
    • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
    • "email": "string",
    • "lastName": "string",
    • "firstName": "string"
    },
  • "brand": "string",
  • "model": "string",
  • "license": "string",
  • "VIN": "string",
  • "firstRegYear": 0,
  • "firstRegMonth": 0,
  • "currentMileage": 0
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "userid": {
    • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
    • "email": "string",
    • "lastName": "string",
    • "firstName": "string"
    },
  • "brand": "string",
  • "model": "string",
  • "license": "string",
  • "VIN": "string",
  • "firstRegYear": 0,
  • "firstRegMonth": 0,
  • "currentMileage": 0
}

api.planning.cars.query

Query the user’s cars based on license plate number and vin.

At least one of the two fields must be present. The search is made by exact match between the search criteria and the car fields.

access_token
query Parameters
license
required
string
VIN
required
string
text
string

api.planning.vaultitems.add

The vault items are filtered to the user profile of the user associated with the token and the client application.

The vault items act like operations and can be added to a wishlist beside operations.

Create a new vault item for a user

Authorizations:
access_token
Request Body schema: application/json
id
required
string = 24 characters

24 char unique id of the vaultItem in the vault (generated by soft-NRG)

userid
required
string = 24 characters

24 char, reference to users

clieantid
string = 24 characters

24 char, service app client id

name
required
string <= 250 characters

250 char, name of the vaultItem

description
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char, description of the vaultItem

extRefNr
required
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char, third party reference number of the vaultItem

origin
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char, origin of the vaultItem

packageType
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char, package type

campaignNumber
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char, campaign number

object
object

if this is specified, operations will be ignored !!!

Array of objects

array of operations (!!! if this is present quantity from the vaultItem will be ignored - because each operation should have its own working quantity !!!)

Array of objects

array of parts

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/vaultitems

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/vaultitems

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "userid": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "clieantid": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "name": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "extRefNr": "string",
  • "origin": "string",
  • "packageType": "string",
  • "campaignNumber": "string",
  • "price": {
    • "brutto": 0,
    • "netto": 0,
    • "currency": "string"
    },
  • "quantity": {
    • "value": 0,
    • "unitsPerHour": 0,
    • "unitName": "string"
    },
  • "operations": [
    • {
      • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "extRefNr": "string",
      • "origin": "string",
      • "price": {
        • "brutto": 0,
        • "netto": 0,
        • "currency": "string"
        },
      • "quantity": {
        • "value": 0,
        • "unitsPerHour": 0,
        • "unit": "string"
        }
      }
    ],
  • "parts": [
    • {
      • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
      • "name": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "extRefNr": "string",
      • "price": {
        • "brutto": 0,
        • "netto": 0,
        • "currency": "string"
        },
      • "quantity": {
        • "value": 0,
        • "unit": "string"
        }
      }
    ]
}

id

string = 24 characters

userid
required
string = 24 characters

string = 24 characters

24 char, service app client id

name
required
string <= 250 characters

description
string <= 250 characters

extRefNr
required
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char, third party reference number of the vaultItem

origin
string <= 250 characters

packageType
string <= 250 characters

campaignNumber
string <= 250 characters

object
object

if this is specified, operations will be ignored !!!

Array of objects

array of operations (!!! if this is present quantity from the vaultItem will be ignored - because each operation should have its own working quantity !!!)

Array of objects

array of parts

Responses

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/vaultitems/{id}

Integration-System

api.planning.vaultitems.remove

Remove vault item

Authorizations:
access_token
path Parameters
id
required
string = 24 characters

id of the vault item

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/vaultitems/{id}

Integration-System

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string"
}

4.2.4 User APIs for rent appointment planning

api.planning.snaps.query

A snap is a possible appointment obtained based on a Wishlist.

To create an appointment from a snap, use the api.planning.appointments.add api.

Following information is for scope.api.planning.rent.service and scope.api.planning.rent.user

• No car data is required (if set will be ignored)

• Fleet relevant fields should be set in Wishlist resource:

o isFleet: Boolean, // mandatory set on true

o fleetType: String, // mandatory rentObject or rentInternalCar

o fleetCategoryid: String, // mandatory id of the fleetcategory resource

o checkInDatePreference: String, // 'asSoonAsPossible', 'date'

o checkInDate: Date, // required if checkInDatePreference is 'date'

o checkOutDate: Date, // optional check out date

o spendTime: String" // optional, format: NumberTimeUnit (5d, 12h) where TimeUnit = [h, d] (h=hours, d=days)
Authorizations:
access_token
Request Body schema: application/json
groupid
required
string = 24 characters

24 char

preferredBranch
string = 24 characters

24 char, preferred branch id

brand
required
string <= 250 characters

max 250 char, brand of the car, for use in operation and rent categories mappings. Should match the value in the saved car.

checkInDatePreference
string
Enum: "asSoonAsPossible" "date"

If the selected value is 'date' then the checkInDate must be set to the desired date

checkInDate
string <date-time>

used only if checkInDatePreference = "date"

checkOutDate
string <date-time>

check out date for rent appointment

checkInTimePreference
string
Enum: "any" "AM" "PM"

Don't care, before noon after noon as defined in the branch settings

waitPreference
boolean

if true, taken into account if the 'waiting' job type is supported by the group and branch

callbackPreference
boolean
directAcceptance
boolean
object

Express appointment option - Used by 3rd party clients to create on spot appointments (The API user must be authorized for the "Express appointment" option.)

operations
Array of strings[ items = 24 characters ]

array of strings, at least one operation, vault item or external operation should be present

vaultItems
Array of strings[ items = 24 characters ]

array of strings, at least one operation, vault item or external operation should be present

Array of objects

array of structures similar to vaultItems

replacementPreference
boolean
rentCategoryid
string = 24 characters

24 char, id in rentCategory resource. If empty or missing, means any rent category

object
object
object
note
string <= 2000 characters

max 2000 char

noteStockItems
string <= 2000 characters

max 2000 char

isFleet
boolean

mandatory for rent appointments

fleetType
string
Enum: "char" "rentObject" "rentInternalCar"

mandatory for rent appointments

fleetCategoryid
string

mandatory for rent appointments, id in fleetcategory collection

spendTime
string

mandatory for fleet appointment if "checkInDate" is set (ex. 3h, 4d)

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/snaps

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/snaps

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json

api.planning.appointments.add

Following information is for scope.api.planning.service

Quick appointment feature: API is available with service token. Create an appointment based on a snap without the need to log on a user.

A snap is a possible appointment obtained based on a Wishlist without the user data.

The Wishlist should contain the car data.

One of the snaps obtained using the api.planning.snaps.query should be sent back to create an appointment.

If the snap contains external operations these can be modified:

• the name and description for the external operation

• the name and description for the embedded operation

• the name and description for the embedded parts

If not already present in the snap, the snap should be patched with the client data. e. g.:

snap.wishlist.client: // User structure

{

email: newUser_email,

lastName: newUser_lastName,

firstName: newUser_firstName,

mobile: newUser_mobile

}

• If a client with the same email exists, the existing user profile will be used.

• If a client with the same email does not exist, a new user profile will be created.

• If a car with the same VIN and license number exists for the user, the existing car will be used.

• If a car with the same VIN and license number does not exist for the user, the new car will be created.

Following information is for scope.api.planning.rent.service

• No car data is required, if set will be ignored.

Following information is for scope.api.planning.user

Create an appointment based on a snap. A snap is a possible appointment obtained based on a Wishlist.

One of the snaps obtained using the api.planning.snaps.query should be sent back to create an appointment.

If the snap contains external operations these can be modified:

• the name and description for the external operation

• the name and description for the embedded operation

• the name and description for the embedded parts

Following information is for scope.api.planning.rent.user

• An appointment can be saved only with a fleet category resource (other combinations are not allowed ex: operations-fleetCategory or externalOperations-fleetCategory)

• No car data is required, if set will be ignored.

Authorizations:
access_token
Request Body schema: application/json
ranking
number

ranking, 3 = best, 2 = medium, 1 = worst, based on score/ranking.

score
number

score

groupid
string

24 char group id

branch
object

24 char branch id

jobTypeCode
string
Enum: "normal" "waiting"
checkInTime
string <date-time>
checkOutTime
string <date-time>
daySpan
number

number of days elapsed between checkInTime and the end of the appointment

totalDurationTime
number

length of the appointment in seconds between the checkIntime and the end of the last operation. The value is computed if the job type is "waiting"

checkInResource
string <= 100 characters

name of ServiceAdvisor

checkInResourceInternalNumber
string <= 100 characters

based on ServiceAdvisor - Internal System Number

checkInResourceEmployeNumber
string <= 100 characters

based on ServiceAdvisor - Employe Number

checkInResourceDMSNumber
string <= 100 characters

based on ServiceAdvisor - number from DMS

replacementStart
string <date-time>

UTC ISO 8601

replacementEnd
string <date-time>

UTC ISO 8601

replacementResource
string <= 100 characters
object (WishlistResource)

All property values are used in the allocation engine to find a possible appointment (snap).

Except for the operations, the properties are treated as "should be". If they cannot be met, a snap may be returned to the user with a decreased score/ranking.

internal
string <= 10000 characters

encoded internal structure, pass it back as is at new appointment

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/appointments

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/appointments

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json

  • "ranking": 0,
  • "score": 0,

api.planning.users.findOne

Retrieve the user profile of the user associated with the token.

Authorizations:
access_token

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/users/myprofile

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/users/myprofile

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "stringstringstringstring",
  • "email": "string",
  • "lastName": "string",
  • "firstName": "string",
  • "phone": "string",
  • "mobile": "string",
  • "address": "string",
  • "zipCode": "string",
  • "city": "string",
  • "country": "string",
  • "language": "string",

    • "contacted": true,
    • "customerAcceptanceDate": "2019-08-24",

    • "dealerLetter": true,
    • "dealerTelephone": true,
    • "dealerSMS": true,
    • "dealerFax": true,
    • "dealerEMail": true,
    • "manufacturerLetter": true,
    • "manufacturerTelephone": true,
    • "manufacturerSMS": true,
    • "manufacturerFax": true,
    • "manufacturerEMail": true,
    • "blocked": true,
    • "revocation": true,
    • "dataPrivacyComment": "string"
    },
  • "globalID": "string"
}

access_token

api.planning.users.canMakeAppointment

Based on the group settings, a user is limited to the number of appointments created in a day.

Use this service to query the possibility to create a new appointment currently.

Authorizations:
access_token

Responses

Production-System

https://api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/users/canmakeappointment

Integration-System

https://int-api.soft-nrg.com/api/planning/users/canmakeappointment

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
true
